calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Aug-30-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Randall E. Kay, Esq. (415-345-1170) for Moving party.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings rules as follows:

THE LAW OFFICE OF KAY & TAWASHA LLP AND ATTORNEY RANDALL E. KAY'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFFS JOSHUA SKENES AND AMANDA SKENES is granted. Two orders signed. (see scanned order for details) Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/HK)

Hearing On Order To Show Cause Re: Contempt
Off Calendar Sep-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Randall Edward Kay of Kay & Tawasha LLP (415-345-1170) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter.

Court hears from plaintiff's counsel as set forth in the transcript.

Motion for Order To Show Cause Re: Contempt is DENIED without prejudice to being refiled. The proof of service shows that order to show cause was served by mail on September 13, 2016, although the order to show cause was issued on August 23, 2016. This is insufficient service.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR #5976, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)

Order To Show Cause Regarding Contempt
Off Calendar Aug-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Randall E. Kay of Kay & Tawasha LLP (415-345-1170) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter.

Plaintiff's Motion for Order To Show Cause Regarding Contempt is GRANTED. No opposition was filed. Order to Show Cause Re Contempt that sets forth the alleged violations and setting a hearing for September 22, 2016, at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302 is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, bus. tel: (530) 339-5023, email: rhunter@sftc.org. (D302)

Application For Entry Of Court Judgment After Default
Off Calendar Jan-05-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Randall E. Kay, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Joshua Skenes and Amanda Skenes,
Amanda Skenes, witness, sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff,
No appearance by defaulted defendant Quoc Nguyen,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $70,400.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $5,387.55
Attorney's Fees: $9,500.00
Costs: $569.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $85,856.55

Judgment signed in open court.
